scripts.build:all: npm -w @wordbase/web run build && npm -w @wordbase/desktop run build && npm -w @wordbase/mobile run build
scripts.clean: npm -w @wordbase/web run clean && npm -w @wordbase/desktop run clean && npm -w @wordbase/mobile run clean
scripts.lint:all: npm -w @wordbase/web run lint && npm -w @wordbase/desktop exec tsc -- --noEmit && npm -w @wordbase/mobile exec tsc -- --noEmit
